RE

Ryann Egang

RN — Registered Adult Nurse
Registered Adult Nurse — Men's Health & Clinical Support

Ryann Egang is the Registered Adult Nurse at Ted's Health, providing clinical support across the patient journey. He handles medical follow-up appointments, answers clinical questions that patients have during treatment, and ensures continuity of care between consultations.

Like Dr Andrews, Ryann continues to work part-time in the NHS. This dual-practice background keeps his clinical skills sharp and his perspective grounded in real-world patient care — not just private clinic protocols.

His role at Ted's Health is essential to the 'same clinician, every time' model that patients consistently cite as one of the clinic's biggest differentiators. Ryann knows his patients and their histories, which means follow-ups are substantive rather than starting from scratch.

"The continuity model at Ted's is what makes the difference. Patients don't have to re-explain everything every time — we already know where they're at."

— Ryann Egang, Registered Adult Nurse, Ted's Health

Areas of expertise

📋
Medical Follow-ups Carries out follow-up consultations to review treatment progress and adjust where needed.
💬
Clinical Q&A Available to answer clinical questions patients have during or between appointments.
🔬
Blood Test Review Reviews and explains blood test results alongside the medical team.
🏥
NHS Practice Active NHS nursing role — brings frontline experience to private care.
🩺
NMC registeredNursing & Midwifery Council
🏥
NHS & privateDual-practice nurse
👤
Same nurse, every timeContinuity of care model
📱
Responsive supportClinical queries handled quickly

Ted's Health is a CQC-registered provider of men's health treatments in the UK. All treatments are UK-licensed and prescribed by registered clinicians. This page is for informational purposes. For medical advice, please consult one of our doctors.
